const r = await tools.exec_command({
  cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run --with pymupdf python - <<'PY'

p='/tmp/fedcourts-predict-73391039/petition.pdf'

    pix.save(f'/tmp/fedcourts-predict-73391039/page-{i+1:02}.png')
print('rendered',len(doc)-10)
PY",
